falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 Index closes above its 200-day moving average by at least 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a clear bullish trend contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting the UNKNOWN phase is incorrect.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces an interest rate cut of >50 basis points in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a drastic policy shift would invalidate the current UNKNOWN verdict by introducing a clear catalyst opposing the 'HOLD' signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) drops below 15 for three consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal extreme market complacency, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal's implication of ongoing uncertainty.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
